questions.question: Six people sit in a row. Chetan sits immediately left of Diya. Bela is at an end. Who sits at the other end if Diya is not at an end?
questions.solution: Step 1: Place Chetan left of Diya. Step 2: Bela at end fixes one side. Step 3: Other end is Gita. Answer: Gita.

questions.question: Six people sit in a row. Diya sits immediately left of Esha. Chetan is at an end. Who sits at the other end if Esha is not at an end?
questions.solution: Step 1: Place Diya left of Esha. Step 2: Chetan at end fixes one side. Step 3: Other end is Harsh. Answer: Harsh.

questions.solution: Step 1: Place Esha left of Farhan. Step 2: Diya at end fixes one side. Step 3: Other end is Amit. Answer: Amit.

questions.solution: Step 1: Place Farhan left of Gita. Step 2: Esha at end fixes one side. Step 3: Other end is Bela. Answer: Bela.
